title: Wellness and Health Services: Care Plans
description: Conroe ISD maintains individualized care plans for students who have specific health conditions, such as diabetes, severe allergies, asthma, or other medical needs that require attention during the school day. These plans outline how school staff should respond to a student's condition and ensure the right support is in place while the student is on campus. Parents and guardians play an important role in developing these plans by working with school health professionals to provide accurate medical information about their child.
